field.label: Trusted Source Networks
field.help: Comma-separated list of trusted IP addresses or networks in CIDR format that will bypass some security checks

field.label: Trusted User Agents
field.help: List of trusted User-Agent strings (one per line) that will receive reduced scrutiny

field.label: Bypass URLs
field.help: List of URL patterns (one per line) that should bypass WAF inspection entirely. Use with caution!
